resources.string:
This module hooks into Xiaomi's security service (MiTrustService). It disables the MRM (Mi Risk Management) daemon from initializing.

Use at your own risk. Do NOT use this feature in violation of local or national laws.

After enabling, please force-stop MiTrustService or reboot your device.
Prevent MiTrustService MRM daemon (mrmd) from initializing. Requires LSPosed activation and a device reboot or force-stop of MiTrustService.

A lightweight LSPosed module that disables Xiaomi MiTrustService MRM (Mi Risk Management) risk detection daemon.

Uses DexKit dynamic method matching (same strategy as HyperCeiler) to locate the obfuscated MRM init method and block it.

Reference: HyperCeiler by ReChronoRain
MRM disable enabled! Please force-stop MiTrustService or reboot device.
